title: Delhi High Court imposes ₹10 lakh fine on Parle Agro for not disclosing sales revenue in PepsiCo trademark case
description: The Delhi High Court has imposed costs of ₹10 lakh on Parle Agro for failing to comply with the Court's earlier direction to periodically disclose its sales figures during the pendency of its trademark dispute with PepsiCo [PepsiCo Vs Parle Agro].Justice Tushar Rao Gedela passed the order on an application filed by PepsiCo alleging violation of the Court’s September 18, 2023 directions governing Parle Agro’s use of the tagline 'For The Bold' in relation to its 'B Fizz' beverage."Though this Cour
